segments.label: Jova Woods continuous layout, day
segments.summary: A continuous 4-column-group Jova Woods segment rendered directly from ROM layout pointers. This is larger than one TV viewport and is not assembled from emulator screenshots.
segments.validation: Column group 0 is the layout source for the existing 0-diff Jova Woods viewport fixture.

validationWindows.label: Validated Jova Woods source column
validationWindows.validation: Column group 0 is the layout source for the existing 0-diff Jova Woods viewport fixture.

segments.label: Jova-Veros Bridge continuous layout, day
segments.summary: A continuous 4-column-group bridge segment derived from objset 2, area 0, submap 1.

segments.label: Veros Woods - Part 1 continuous layout, day
segments.summary: A continuous 2-column-group Veros Woods segment derived from objset 2, area 0, submap 2.

segments.label: Veros Woods - Part 2 continuous layout, day
segments.summary: A continuous 2-column-group Veros Woods segment using the special FE 06 FF screen-record sequence to resolve layout index 0x06.
segments.validation: pending emulator fixture; screen record starts with FE 06 FF, so layout index 0x06 is supplied as an explicit segment override.

routes.label: Jova to Veros outdoor route, day
routes.summary: The full outdoor route from Jova Woods through the bridge and Veros Woods, rendered from ROM layout data as connected layout-space segments.
